delegatedBy.description:
Investigate delegation tools surface. Read these files and write findings to .hivemind/planning/tools-audit-58-9-2026-06-05/01-tools-surface.md:

1. src/tools/delegation/delegate-task.ts — actions, args, Zod schema, coordinator dispatch
2. src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts — find-stackable, status values
3. src/coordination/delegation/manager.ts — dispatch path, coordinator forwarding
4. src/coordination/delegation/coordinator.ts — spawnTmuxPanelForChild, lifecycle

For each: list actions, required args, status values used, integration points. Format as markdown table.

Constraints:
- Read-only. Write to .hivemind/planning/tools-audit-58-9-2026-06-05/01-tools-surface.md only
- Be concise but thorough
